description: Train a Decision Tree classification model using the Breast Cancer dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BreastCancer.csv. Use 'Diagnosis' as the target variable and all other 30 numeric variables as predictors. Configure the model with 80% training data, a seed of 123, and a maximum depth of 4. Generate a decision tree plot and save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/cancer_tree.jasp. Record the 'Test Accuracy' and the 'Root Split Variable' in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/tree_report.txt.
